<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check segmentation for purple ring
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Purple nodes ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:

        print(f"  id={node['id']} pixels={node['pixels']} hash={node['hash']}")
        print(f"    boundary={node['boundary']}")
        print(f"    children={node['children']}")

# Also check all non-background colored nodes
print("\n=== All colored nodes (non-B/non-G/non-W) ===")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] not in 'BGW':
        print(f"  id={node['id']} color={node['color']} pixels={node['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
